title: feat(finance): live stripe mtd + shifted payouts + unmatched guards
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Smarter hive accounting
gist.blurb: Upgraded our internal finance tracker to pull live Stripe data and handle unmatched transactions gracefully. Better runway projections mean a healthier hive!
gist.summary: Improved the internal financial tracker to align Stripe revenue with activity months and added safeguards against hanging cron jobs for unmatched transactions.
gist.impact: Internal operations now have more accurate runway projections and reliable automated sheet updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant. She is wearing tiny reading glasses and looking at a glowing retro terminal displaying a spreadsheet or chart with a green upward trend. A chunky robot companion is holding a stack of digital coins or a receipt. Cozy, warm lighting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing retro terminal displaying a spreadsheet with a green upward trend. A cute chunky robot with a monitor head stands nearby holding a stack of digital gold coins. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
